## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run build && npm test` pass.
- [ ] If you touched `skills/**`, `npm run eval` passes (skill evals).
- [ ] If you touched an OpenSpec change, `superspecs validate <change-id>` exits 0.
- [ ] If you touched `src/` or `schemas/`, `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `## [Unreleased]` (CI-enforced).
